message:
test(fcp-core): pin LeasePurpose Display + LeaseId FromStr invariants (flywheel_connectors-5ktrj)

Bead asks for LeaseToken Display+FromStr roundtrip + format
constraints. fcp-core has no type literally named LeaseToken; the
token-shaped surface around leases splits across two existing types:
LeaseId (= ObjectId, has Display + std::str::FromStr via
parse_prefixed) and LeasePurpose (6-variant enum with hand-written
snake_case Display tokens but NO std::str::FromStr — round-trip is
via serde JSON instead).

Coverage:
- LeasePurpose Display token pinned per variant (operation_execution
  / connector_state_write / computation_migration /
  coordinator_election / migration / resource_access)
- Display agrees with #[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")] JSON tag
  byte-for-byte per variant
- JSON round-trip preserves variant identity for all 6
- Serde JSON acts as the FromStr substitute (every Display token
  accepted; PascalCase + unknown tokens rejected)
- CBOR round-trip preserves variant for all 6
- Hash + Eq + Copy correctness; LeasePurpose serves as HashMap key
- 6 variants pairwise distinct (Display, Eq, Hash)
- LeaseId Display = 64 lowercase hex chars; FromStr accepts both
  bare hex and `objectid:<hex>` prefix forms
- LeaseId FromStr rejects non-hex / wrong-length / empty / odd-length
- Prefix stripping is exact-match on `objectid:` (rejects
  `ObjectId:`, `0x`, `objectid::`)
- to_prefixed_string canonical round-trip across multiple seeds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
